purpose: Data table for the Portal 2 credits recreation. It defines the Portal 2 personnel credits and the timed lyric segments for "Want You Gone" consumed by portal2/cake.js.
invariants: lyrics entries provide delay, text, nonewline, and clear fields because portal2/cake.js reads those names directly.
credits remains an ordered array; scroll timing is derived from total credit character count.
Delay values are in seconds and are converted by cake.delayMultiplier at runtime.
gotchas: Text is injected through string-form setTimeout in portal2/cake.js, so unescaped double quotes in lyric or credit text can break playback.
Some credit and lyric strings contain non-ASCII names and punctuation; preserve file encoding when editing.
